code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering both Medicare and Medicaid data, for having Diagnosis and Procedure Basis for opioid use disorder Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
null/missing
